title: [MTR3/4] CP Lisbon Suburban Trains Pack
description: Resource pack that adds CP3150 and CP2300/CP2400 units into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview
![CP2400 and CP3150](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a2bf63a08e3c464adcf8c7fc07a1e72341dc589.png)
CP Class 3100 and CP Class 3200 are two related series of railway multiple units with Iberian gauge, 2'2'+Bo'Bo'+2'2' wheel arrangement. They utilise a 1500 V direct current voltage system. They were first introduced in 1959 in the suburbs of Lisbon. The series was refurbished between 1998 and 2002. Since the renewal, this series has been known as the CP Class 3150 and CP Class 3250.

The 2300 Series refers to a type of electric traction railcar, used by the operator Comboios de Portugal in urban services in Lisbon, Portugal.

The 2400 Series (2401/2451 - 2414/2464) refers to a type of railcar used by the operator Comboios de Portugal in suburban services in the Lisbon Metropolitan Area, in Portugal.

This resource pack is to add the CP Class 3150/3250, The CP Class 2300 and the CP Class 2400 into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, the base of the Models was made by Movies22, with Vitor2005 adapting the Models to MTR and making adjustments/finishing the CP 2300 and CP2400.

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, CP - Comboios de Portugal.
